title: Arcana Agent Target Registry
description: Authoritative registry for agent instruction files, skill registration behavior, and automatic configuration support.

targets.label: Claude Code
targets.summary: Arcana injects the Grimoire block and registers full skill folders.

targets.label: Codex / ChatGPT CLI
targets.summary: Arcana injects the Grimoire block and registers pointer-only SKILL.md folders.
limitations: Registered skill directories contain SKILL.md only.

targets.label: ChatGPT (hosted)
targets.summary: Paste the Grimoire block manually into Custom Instructions.
limitations: No local skill directory is available to Arcana.

targets.label: GitHub Copilot
targets.summary: Add the Grimoire block manually to repository instructions when useful.
limitations: Project-level files require explicit user approval before editing.
Length limits may require trimming to the core routing sections.

targets.label: Cursor
targets.summary: Add the Grimoire block manually to Cursor rules.
limitations: Arcana does not manage Cursor rule files automatically.
